title: [phase:replan] [family:reporting] [provider_hint:codex] Current task: openclaw-tmux replacement. Produce a concise operator-facing checkpoint: what is done, what remains blocked, and the next safest action. No edits.
summary_text: **Findings** - No repo-local non-interactive NotebookLM auth bootstrap is wired today. - Workflows only wire runtime toggles and binary path (`FUGUE_NOTEBOOKLM_RUNTIME_ENABLED`, `FUGUE_NOTEBOOKLM_REQUIRE_RUNTIME_AUTH`, `FUGUE_NOTEBOOKLM_BIN`), not auth credentials/session material ([notebooklm-runtime-smoke.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/notebooklm-runtime-smoke.yml:155), [fugue-codex-implement.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/.github/workflows/fugue-codex-implement.yml:917)). - Runtime availability check is `adapter --action smoke` (`nlm --help` path), so it can pass without authenticated NotebookLM session ([notebooklm-preflight-enrich.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/notebooklm-preflight-enrich.sh:224), [notebooklm-cli-adapter.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/lib/notebooklm-cli-adapter.sh:452)). - Documentation explicitly assumes auth is pre-established on the runner user, not provisioned by automation ([notebooklm-live-verification-2026-03-13.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/docs/notebooklm-live-verification-2026-03-13.md:49), [notebooklm-skills-profile.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/docs/notebooklm-skills-profile.md:77)). - Secret/bootstrap scripts include NotebookLM mode/bin variables only; no NotebookLM auth secret/token/cookie variables are defined ([bootstrap-prod-secrets.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/local/bootstrap-prod-secrets.sh:30), [sync-gh-secrets-from-env.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/local/sync-gh-secrets-from-env.sh:295)).
